title: taraxacum coartatum
intro: Taraxacum coartatum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving digestion. Taraxacum coartatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsules or added to food, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties. Additionally, the plant is also used as a natural diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues.
